9.reason: [Accesses s[i-1] and s[i+1] without checking bounds; when i=0, s[i-1] is out of bounds, and when i=len-1, s[i+1] is out of bounds. Also, condition should be s[i-1] < s[i+1], not <=, per problem requirements.]

10.reason: [Modifies s[i-1] which affects future comparisons; also prints one extra character beyond the correct range (should stop before s[i+1]).]

14.reason: [Skipping ahead by 2 may cause missed characters or out-of-bounds access, especially if '-' is at the end or near boundaries.]

27.reason: [Returns 2 for uppercase letters AND any other character (like '-', symbols), which causes incorrect type matching (e.g., 'A' and '-' both return 2, leading to false expansion).]
